name: Weapon Grip Gloves
rulesText:
Handwear
Clothing • Gloves
Weapon Grip: Once per combat, when you make a melee weapon attack, add +1 Physical Damage.

traits: Weapon Grip: Once per combat, when you make a melee weapon attack, add +1 Physical Damage.

source.sourceSection: Handwear Equipment Cards > Weapon Grip Gloves
source.notes: The once-per-combat trait should use the established equipment-use tracking method.
